products.name: HPDM-180D
products.descriptor: 180 kW direct-drive integrated motor drive with SiC inverter, 13.9 kW/kg at 20,000 RPM

evidence.snippet:
HPDM-180D
=========
High Power Density Machine 180kW
Direct-Drive Version (HPDM-180D)
The HPDM-180D is now open for **early access programs**. To learn more or request evaluation units, please contact the H3X team.

products.name: HPDM-180R
products.descriptor: 180 kW integrated motor drive with 6.7:1 planetary gearbox, 3,000 RPM propeller-ready output

evidence.snippet:
HPDM-180
========
High Power Density Machine 180kW
Reduction Gearbox Version (HPDM-180R)

H3X Technologies has released the **HPDM-180R**, a high performance integrated motor drive system that delivers **180 kW of continuous power** in a compact, lightweight **16 kg** package. This all-in-one unit combines an electric motor, silicon carbide inverter, and planetary gearbox into a single unit, enabling exceptional power density and system efficiency.

unresolved_questions: HPDM-140: Only located in the homepage product carousel (resource-0001, lines 184–190) with minimal specs (140 kW, 11 kg, 20,000 RPM). No dedicated product page was crawled or indexed; readiness remains unknown. A page at https://www.h3x.tech/products/hpdm-140 likely exists and would resolve full specs and maturity.

HPDM-180D readiness: The news post (resource-0011) states it is 'open for early access programs', classified here as low_rate_production. If the product has since moved to full production, re-crawling the product page would update that status.
HPDG-30 and HPDM-350 both carry 'Target Specifications' language with note that estimates will be verified through testing, hence classified as prototype. No firm production language found in corpus.

fetch_requests.reason: HPDM-140 appears in the homepage carousel with basic specs but has no crawled product page. Fetching would provide full specifications, readiness signals, and compliance claims.
fetch_requests.source_hint: linked from resource-0001 homepage carousel; not present in crawl_index
